topics.title: Academy Awards and Satellite Radio Merger
topics.summary: The show reviews the Academy Awards, critiques various celebrity appearances and fashion choices, and discusses the upcoming merger between XM and Sirius satellite radio services.

topics.title: Satellite Radio Merger and Industry Competition
topics.summary: The studio discusses the potential benefits of a satellite radio merger, including lower costs and more programming for consumers, while also addressing the impact of competition from digital devices.

topics.title: Radio Industry Influence and Past Specials
topics.summary: The studio discusses a report on personal influence in broadcasting, reviews of recent music and comedy specials featuring Billy West and Jackie Martling, and the complexities of past talent management.

topics.title: Radio Show History and Guest Interactions
topics.summary: The show features discussions regarding a two-week history special, interactions with regular callers, a humorous anecdote about a loud hotel party in South Beach, and a segment involving a new CD from Chubby Checker.

topics.title: XM and Sirius Satellite Radio Merger
topics.summary: The studio features a discussion with Mel from Sirius regarding the strategic benefits, cost savings, and regulatory hurdles involved in merging with XM to compete more effectively against terrestrial radio.

topics.title: Sirius and XM Satellite Radio Merger
topics.summary: The studio discusses the potential benefits of a satellite radio merger, including expanded content options for consumers, cost savings from consolidated operations, and the navigation of regulatory hurdles with the FCC and Justice Department.

topics.title: Sirius and XM Satellite Radio Merger
topics.summary: The studio discusses the strategic advantages, regulatory hurdles, and potential branding of the merger between Sirius and XM satellite radio services.

topics.title: Mel Carmuson's Congressional Testimony Preparation
topics.summary: The studio discusses Mel Carmuson’s upcoming testimony before Congress regarding a satellite radio merger, debating his strategy, travel plans, and the potential impact on the industry.

topics.title: Caller Interaction and Academy Awards Discussion
topics.summary: The studio features a call from a listener who describes his lifestyle as a homebound stoner while the hosts discuss Hollywood nudity and recent awards show moments.

topics.title: Mr. Skin Anatomy Awards
topics.summary: The studio presents a series of awards for nudity in mainstream films and television, featuring discussions on various actresses and their performances.

topics.title: Film Nudity Analysis with Mr. Skin
topics.summary: The studio features a guest appearance by Mr. Skin to discuss specific scenes of nudity in various films featuring actresses like Jessica Alba, Monica Bellucci, and Eva Mendes.

topics.title: Anna Nicole Smith Legal Dispute and Pillow Fight
topics.summary: The studio reviews a controversial interview with Prince Frederick von Hunstein regarding Anna Nicole Smith's legal case before transitioning to footage of Benji participating in an organized pillow fight and a protest against sex and media.

topics.title: Howard 100 Newsroom Segment
topics.summary: The studio covers a variety of topics including a local pillow fight video, the Sirius and XM merger, an internal investigation into a staff member's actions, a dangerous cruise incident involving a marine, a kidnapping case in Florida, and a zookeeper's fatal encounter with a jaguar.

topics.title: Radio Influence and Celebrity News
topics.summary: The studio discusses the host's influence in the radio industry, legal disputes regarding Anna Nicole Smith, Britney Spears' health struggles, a documentary about Jesus Christ, and recent Academy Award winners.

topics.title: Oscars Highlights and Celebrity News
topics.summary: The studio reviews recent Academy Award winners, including Helen Mirren and Forrest Whitaker, while discussing celebrity news involving Al Gore, Louis Farrakhan, and various entertainment figures.
